{{Infobox character
| name = Herta
| species = Alien
| professions = {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[assistant]], journeyman prosthetic Technician, virus Technician}}
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Pilot (novel)|The Pilot]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Herta is an assistant and a specialized virus Technician. She belongs to a lesser-known species characterized by physical proportions that resemble an elongated human, featuring an enlarged head, large eyes, and exceptionally long limbs and fingers. In her professional capacity, she possesses a unique gift related to her technical expertise, which was kept confidential by [[Doctor Elios]] to prevent complications. Her specific skills were utilized to treat [[Aila]], and her professional history is documented through employment records that intersect with the galactic tracking of the [[Keeper virus]].}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Herta is a young woman of a minor species characterized by wide eyes, an over-inflated head, and long fingers and limbs. Serving as the assistant to [[Doctor Elios]], she also works as a virus technician and a journeyman prosthetic technician. Eventually, her likeness is lost from [[Omal]]'s collection, as he can no longer see her picture.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Herta]] is [[Doctor Elios]]'s assistant.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c13">''The Pilot'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Herta]] is a young woman of a minor species with long limbs and fingers, an over-inflated head, and wide eyes.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Herta]] is a journeyman prosthetic Technician.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c17">''The Pilot'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Herta]] is a virus Technician.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Herta]] is a person whose picture [[Omal]] can no longer see in his collection.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c33">''The Pilot'', chapter 33</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
[[Category:Aliens]]
